name: acid-prophet
description: Structured spec-writing for Codex: idea discovery, approach selection, reviewed specs, and optional Linear handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Turn raw ideas into reviewed specs
interface.longDescription: Acid Prophet bundles Codex skills for structured product discovery: one-question-at-a-time clarification, approach tradeoff analysis, section-by-section spec validation, written markdown specs, self-review, and an optional handoff to Linear Devotee for Linear project creation.
defaultPrompt: Use Acid Prophet to turn this feature idea into a reviewed spec.
Use Acid Prophet to structure this project before creating Linear work.
